CustomField.formula: CASE(NATT_Unit__c, "200INT ComfortPro Integrated APU","Special Product", "210STA ComfortPro Stand-alone APU ","Special Product", "220PWR ComfortPro Power-only APU ","Special Product", "230SKY ComfortPro ClearSky DPF APU ","Special Product", "240EPS ComfortPro Electric APU ","Special Product", "Supra 950 MT - System A ","Multi-Temp (Truck)", "Supra 950 MT - System B ","Multi-Temp (Truck)", "Supra S6 Road Only ","Single-Temp (Truck)", "Supra S6 with 230v-3ph-60Hz ","Single-Temp (Truck)", "Supra S7 Road Only ","Single-Temp (Truck)", "Supra S7 with 230v-3ph-60Hz ","Single-Temp (Truck)", "Supra S8 Road Only ","Single-Temp (Truck)", "Supra S8 with 230v-3ph-60Hz ","Single-Temp (Truck)", "Supra S9 Road Only ","Single-Temp (Truck)", "Supra S9 with 230v-3ph-60Hz ","Single-Temp (Truck)", "Solara APX ","APX Series (Trailer)", "Vector 8100 ","Vector Single Temp (Trailer)", "Vector 8500 ","Vector Single Temp (Trailer)", "Vector 8500R Rail Edition ","Single-Temp (Rail)", "Vector 8600 - System 01 ","Vector Multi-Temp (Trailer)", "Vector 8600 - System 02 ","Vector Multi-Temp (Trailer)", "Vector 8600 - System 03 ","Vector Multi-Temp (Trailer)", "Vector 8600 - System 04 ","Vector Multi-Temp (Trailer)", "Vector 8600 - System 05 ","Vector Multi-Temp (Trailer)", "Vector 8600 - System 06 ","Vector Multi-Temp (Trailer)", "Vector 8600 - System 07 ","Vector Multi-Temp (Trailer)", "Vector 8600 - System 13 ","Vector Multi-Temp (Trailer)", "Vector 8600 - System 14 ","Vector Multi-Temp (Trailer)", "Vector 8600 - System 15 ","Vector Multi-Temp (Trailer)", "Vector 8600 - System 16 ","Vector Multi-Temp (Trailer)", "Vector 8611MT ","Vector Multi-Temp (Trailer)", "Vector HE19 ","Vector Multi-Temp (Trailer)", "X4 7300 ","Vector Single Temp (Trailer)", "X4 7300R Rail Edition ","Single-Temp (Rail)", "X4 7500 ","Vector Single Temp (Trailer)", "X4 7500R Rail Edition ","Single-Temp (Rail)", "Supra 960 Road Only ","Single-Temp (Truck)", "Supra 960 with 230v-3ph-60Hz Standby","Single-Temp (Truck)", "None")
CustomField.label: EMCC Classification
